Name: ASHWINI S
Aptitude Test:
The test consisted of 60 technical questions
They were based on:
Computer networks
Operating system, 
LINUX
Cloud computing
Virtualization 
A few aptitude questions 
in a duration of 60minutes.
Interview:
There were 4 rounds on interviews.

In the first round, we were tested on our
basic knowledge in computer networks,
Operating systems and troubleshooting.
(30mins)

In the second round, they went in-depth
on the technical topics.
(30mins)

In the third round, we were tested based
on our managerial skills with some
situation based questions. 
We were also asked questions on
LINUX commands
(40mins)

The final round was director round
where we were asked situation based
questions, questions based on resume
and also common HR questions
(45mins)
Technical Subjects:
Computer Networks
Operating System
LINUX
Cloud computing
No. of rounds & Names of those:
Total no. of rounds: 5
1. Technical test (MCQs)
2. Technical Interview 1
3. Technical Interview 2
4. Managerial Round
5. Director Round
Questions asked during F2F interview:
Conceptual questions on technical topics.
Questions based on resume.
Scenario based questions.
General HR questions.

Interview process was challenging, 
comprising of questions from networks, 
cloud, virtualisation, linux, operating system etc. 
Selection process also considers troubleshooting 
skills where different scenarios were given and we 
had to build a logical approach on solving the issue. 
There were also conceptual/theoretical questions 
from networking. 
Some questions include checking the 
understanding of linux commands.
